trending.title: On one of the hottest days this year in Switzerland, with temperatures close to 38°C, I hiked this mountain. Carrying my camera, tripod, and plenty of water, I climbed around 1,000 meters, knowing the effort would be worth it. At the summit, the heat gave way to a peaceful evening. The light softened, the mountains grew quiet, and the dramatic ridges glowed in the last colors of the day. The moment I pressed the shutter, I knew I had the image I came for. With the photo captured, I enjoyed the hike back down under the light of my headlamp, already looking forward to the final result.
trending.author: Pascal Debrunner
